word: H4414 - מָלַח - mâlach - maw-lakh' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: מלח

Transliteration: mâlach

Phonetic: maw-lakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tear away, dissipate
    1. (Niphal) to be dispersed, be dissipated
  2. to salt, season
    1. (Qal) to salt, season
    2. (Pual) to be salted
    3. (Hophal) to be rubbed or washed with salt

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1196,1197

Part(s) of speech: Verb
